title: DryBulbTemperatureResult
description: DryBulbTemperatureResult: A results object containing dry bulb temperature data.

Result.description: The value associated with the results object. Property has a quantity of type Temperature meassured in [K].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
